item.title: [AI tutorial] 在 comfyUI 使用 Illustrious XL checkpoint 結合綾瀨桃 LoRA #Illustrious #AI #sdxl #manga
item.itunes:title: [AI tutorial] 在 comfyUI 使用 Illustrious XL checkpoint 結合綾瀨桃 LoRA #Illustrious #AI #sdxl #manga
item.itunes:author: JoeMultimedia
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kbyHv1rhqi0 生成二次元的圖片時總希望能按照提示詞，並且產出的圖片的手指跟腳趾能正常與漂亮， Illustrious XL 滿足了我們的需求，此次教學搭配 comfyUI 來使用並結合 LoRA。 Illustrious XL 網站 https://huggingface.co/OnomaAIResearch/Illustrious-xl-early-release-v0 checkpoint https://civitai.com/models/820208/obsession-illustrious-xl 綾瀨桃 LoRA https://civitai.com/models/945882/illustriousxl-v01-momo-ayase-or-dandadan sdxl-flat LoRA https://huggingface.co/2vXpSwA7/iroiro-lora/blob/main/sdxl/sdxl-flat.safetensors 提示詞參考 https://oekaki-ai.com/novelai-change-style-keyword-list/ 使用硬體： AMD R5 5600X 48GB RAM My Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/JoeAndMultimedia My Patreon Page: https://www.patreon.com/joemultimedia AIArt, AI Girl, AI Pics, AI Pictures, AI Photos, AI Images, AI Hot, AI Hotpic, AI Hottie, AI Model, AI Gallery, AI Lady, AI그림, AI絵, AI絵画, Al繪圖, Al藝術, AI绘图, AI艺术, Arte IA, AI눈나, 대유쾌마운틴, AI돌리기, Photorealistic, ai룩북, #여자친구 #룩북 #란제리 #속옷모델 #여자 #girl #friend #lookbook #AI #aipicture #aiimages #AIart #aigirl #beautyart #beautygirl
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kbyHv1rhqi0 生成二次元的圖片時總希望能按照提示詞，並且產出的圖片的手指跟腳趾能正常與漂亮， Illustrious XL 滿足了我們的需求，此次教學搭配 comfyUI 來使用並結合 LoRA。 Illustrious XL 網站 https://huggingface.co/OnomaAIResearch/Illustrious-xl-early-release-v0 checkpoint https://civitai.com/models/820208/obsession-illustrious-xl 綾瀨桃 LoRA https://civitai.com/models/945882/illustriousxl-v01-momo-ayase-or-dandadan sdxl-flat LoRA https://huggingface.co/2vXpSwA7/iroiro-lora/blob/main/sdxl/sdxl-flat.safetensors 提示詞參考 https://oekaki-ai.com/novelai-change-style-keyword-list/ 使用硬體： AMD R5 5600X 48GB RAM My Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/JoeAndMultimedia My Patreon Page: https://www.patreon.com/joemultimedia AIArt, AI Girl, AI Pics, AI Pictures, AI Photos, AI Images, AI Hot, AI Hotpic, AI Hottie, AI Model, AI Gallery, AI Lady, AI그림, AI絵, AI絵画, Al繪圖, Al藝術, AI绘图, AI艺术, Arte IA, AI눈나, 대유쾌마운틴, AI돌리기, Photorealistic, ai룩북, #여자친구 #룩북 #란제리 #속옷모델 #여자 #girl #friend #lookbook #AI #aipicture #aiimages #AIart #aigirl #beautyart #beautygirl
item.content:encoded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kbyHv1rhqi0 生成二次元的圖片時總希望能按照提示詞，並且產出的圖片的手指跟腳趾能正常與漂亮， Illustrious XL 滿足了我們的需求，此次教學搭配 comfyUI 來使用並結合 LoRA。 Illustrious XL 網站 https://huggingface.co/OnomaAIResearch/Illustrious-xl-early-release-v0 checkpoint https://civitai.com/models/820208/obsession-illustrious-xl 綾瀨桃 LoRA https://civitai.com/models/945882/illustriousxl-v01-momo-ayase-or-dandadan sdxl-flat LoRA https://huggingface.co/2vXpSwA7/iroiro-lora/blob/main/sdxl/sdxl-flat.safetensors 提示詞參考 https://oekaki-ai.com/novelai-change-style-keyword-list/ 使用硬體： AMD R5 5600X 48GB RAM My Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/JoeAndMultimedia My Patreon Page: https://www.patreon.com/joemultimedia AIArt, AI Girl, AI Pics, AI Pictures, AI Photos, AI Images, AI Hot, AI Hotpic, AI Hottie, AI Model, AI Gallery, AI Lady, AI그림, AI絵, AI絵画, Al繪圖, Al藝術, AI绘图, AI艺术, Arte IA, AI눈나, 대유쾌마운틴, AI돌리기, Photorealistic, ai룩북, #여자친구 #룩북 #란제리 #속옷모델 #여자 #girl #friend #lookbook #AI #aipicture #aiimages #AIart #aigirl #beautyart #beautygirl
